chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3494 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A. No. 19497/2016 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2021 Mr. Ayaz Hussain Tunio advocate for petitioners. Mr. Abdul Majeed Khan advocate for respondents No.2 and 3. Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan advocate for HESCO. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. After seeking instructions, learned counsel for the petitioners confirms that petitioners 1, 3, 4 and 5 have been promoted and as such this petition has become infructuous to the extent of the relief prayed for by the said petitioners. Regarding petitioner No.2, learned counsel for HESCO undertakes that the case of promotion of petitioner No.2 shall be considered and decided in the next meeting of the Selection Board strictly in accordance with law and the relevant / prevailing rules, regulations and policy. By consent, the petition and listed application stand disposed of in the terms of the above undertaking with no order as to costs. J U D G E J U D G E Ali Haider
